expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “1) Focus explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable (BLOCKING)”, the run states: “REPORT_STATE taxonomy and meaning is defined (FINAL_EXISTS / DRAFT_EXISTS / CONTEXT_ONLY / FRESH) …” and “Resume semantics for drafts are explicitly part of the contract via selected_mode including resume (for DRAFT_EXISTS) and the rule ‘Continue from current state. No reset.’” Execution_notes.md also says Phase 0 was verified to include “REPORT_STATE classification” and “deterministic routing semantics for full_regenerate / smart_refresh / reuse / resume”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md: “./outputs/result.md (contract-focused benchmark result for phase0)” and “Checks performed (phase0 only)”. result.md section “2) Output aligns with primary phase: phase0 (BLOCKING)” states “Phase 0 responsibilities and required artifacts are explicitly enumerated” and concludes “This benchmark deliverable stays at phase0 contract verification … which matches the benchmark requirement.”
